t_pose.name: T-Pose
t_pose.benefits: Calibration pose for body alignment, strengthens arms and shoulders
t_pose.instructions: Stand straight, arms extended horizontally at shoulder height, palms down

trikonasana.name: Triangle Pose (Trikonasana)
trikonasana.benefits: Helps in reducing excess body weight, strengthens legs and arms, improves digestion
trikonasana.instructions: Stand wide, extend one arm down to ankle, other arm up, chest open, legs straight

naukasana.name: Boat Pose (Naukasana)
naukasana.benefits: Strengthens legs, improves balance, enhances focus, instills determination and resilience
naukasana.instructions: Balance on sitting bones, legs and torso raised at 45°, arms parallel to ground

bhujangasana.name: Cobra Pose (Bhujangasana)
bhujangasana.benefits: Improves strength of back and legs, improves balance when practiced regularly
bhujangasana.instructions: Lie face down, hands under shoulders, lift chest, keep pelvis grounded, elbows slightly bent

balasana.name: Child's Pose (Balasana)
balasana.benefits: Calms mind, enhances peace, improves body posture, relaxes entire body
balasana.instructions: Knees wide, big toes touching, sit back on heels, arms extended forward

shavasana.name: Corpse Pose (Shavasana)
shavasana.benefits: Mentally, physically, and emotionally relaxing. Improves memory and concentration
shavasana.instructions: Lie flat on back, arms at sides, palms up, legs slightly apart, completely relaxed

vrikshasana.name: Tree Pose (Vrikshasana)
vrikshasana.benefits: Improves balance, strengthens legs and core, enhances focus and concentration
vrikshasana.instructions: Stand on one leg, place other foot on inner thigh, hands in prayer position or overhead

sukhasana.name: Easy Pose (Sukhasana)
sukhasana.benefits: Calms mind, strengthens back, opens hips, improves posture and breathing
sukhasana.instructions: Sit cross-legged, spine straight, hands on knees, shoulders relaxed

chakrasana.name: Wheel Pose (Chakrasana)
chakrasana.benefits: Cures back and kidney pain, stimulates thyroid and pituitary glands, improves flexibility
chakrasana.instructions: Lie on back, bend knees and elbows, lift body into arch, hands and feet on ground

virabhadrasana.name: Warrior I Pose (Virabhadrasana I)
virabhadrasana.benefits: Strengthens legs, opens chest and shoulders, improves focus and stability
virabhadrasana.instructions: Lunge forward, back leg straight, arms raised overhead, chest lifted

warrior_2.name: Warrior II Pose (Virabhadrasana II)
warrior_2.benefits: Strengthens legs, opens hips and chest, improves balance and concentration
warrior_2.instructions: Front knee bent at 90°, back leg straight, arms parallel to ground, gaze over front hand
